headline: Fortinet Introduces FortiOS 8.0 to Expand Secure Networking with Secure AI Controls, Fabric-based AI Agents, Flexible SASE, and Simplified SD-WAN

headline: Kevin Mandia sold his cybersecurity company to Google in 2022. He has a fresh $190 million for a new venture
summary: Mandiant founder Kevin Mandia is staying in cybersecurity after selling his prior company to Google, but now he's focused on AI.
